title: pleioluma moluccana
intro: Pleioluma moluccana, also known as the Sago tree or Umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. Native to the Moluccas and other parts of Indonesia, this plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The leaves of the Pleioluma moluccana contain flavonoids and tannins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, offering benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves can be made into a tea or used in infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
